description: Top-down stealth roguelite. You are a lone triangle running mission after mission through procgen complexes — extract, destroy, rescue, eliminate, hack, heist. Loot weapons (pistol, shotgun, SMG, rifle, sniper, LMG, launcher), stack mods (rapid, explosive, lifesteal, pierce, crit...) and pick passive perks (berserk, glass cannon, juggernaut...) to forge a run. Enemies patrol with sight cones and hearing — they only fight when they spot or hear you, and take cover to reload. Single-player. Highscore = deepest level reached.
